steps.t: Shúkurz will meet you by the southern entrance of Vatug-ronk. Vatug-ronk is located on the lowest level of Deepscrave, to the west of Aslíf.
Shúkurz has asked you to free a few imprisoned Orcs. Their cages can be found around Vatug-ronk.
You have freed the Orcs. Shúkurz is waiting for you by the southern entrance to Vatug-ronk.
